sql:
CREATE TABLE "Track"
            (
                CONSTRAINT "PK_Track" FOREIGN KEY ("TrackId"),
                FOREIGN KEY ("AlbumId") REFERENCES "Album" (
                    "AlbumId"
                ) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION,
                FOREIGN KEY ("AlbumId") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE RESTRICT,
                FOREIGN KEY ("AlbumId") ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE SET DEFAULT
            )
expected: CREATE TABLE "Track" (CONSTRAINT "PK_Track" FOREIGN KEY ("TrackId"), FOREIGN KEY ("AlbumId") REFERENCES "Album" ("AlbumId") ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION, FOREIGN KEY ("AlbumId") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE RESTRICT, FOREIGN KEY ("AlbumId") ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE SET DEFAULT)
actual:
CREATE TABLE "Track"
            (
                CONSTRAINT "PK_Track" FOREIGN KEY ("TrackId"),
                FOREIGN KEY ("AlbumId") REFERENCES "Album" (
                    "AlbumId"
                ) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION,
                FOREIGN KEY ("AlbumId") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE RESTRICT,
                FOREIGN KEY ("AlbumId") ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE SET DEFAULT
            )
